name: Tart with Caramelized Onions, Goat Cheese and Green Olives
recipeIngredient: 1 red bell pepper, roasted, peeled and cut in thin strips
recipeInstructions:
CRUST
1. Put bread flour, all-purpose flour, and salt in a food processor.
Pulse to combine.
2. Add cold butter and olive oil. Process until thoroughly cut into the flour.
3. Add ice water. Process until dough forms a ball.
4. Remove from the food processor and press into a disk.
5. Wrap tightly and refrigerate at least 1 hour.
CARAMELIZED ONIONS
6. Combine onions, olive oil, and rosemary in a large skillet.
7. Cover and cook over medium heat until onions release their water, about 15 minutes.
8. Stir, reduce heat to low, and continue cooking, stirring frequently, until onions begin to brown, about 1 hour.
9. Remove lid and continue cooking over low heat, stirring frequently, until onions are deep brown, 30 to 45 minutes. Do not let onions scorch.
10. Set a strainer over a bowl. Remove rosemary and turn onions into the strainer.
11. Set aside until onions are drained of all oil.
ASSEMBLY
12. Remove tart dough from the refrigerator and roll out to 1/4-inch thickness.
13. Place in a tart pan with a removable bottom, folding double along the edge to make a sturdy rim.
14. Spoon onions across the bottom of the tart pan.
15. Season lightly with salt and pepper.
16. Dot goat cheese over onions.
17. Scatter olives over goat cheese.
18. Arrange pepper strips over all.
19. Bake at 400°F until crust is browned and cheese is melted, about 45 minutes.
[6 servings. Each serving: 494 calories; 497 mg sodium; 43 mg cholesterol; 32 grams fat; 43 grams carbohydrates; 11 grams protein; 1.46 grams fiber.]
